message:
🌱 containerd: "failed to copy: io: read/write on closed pipe" on `ctr images push` while (#1914)

* 🌱 Add containerd: "failed to copy: io: read/write on closed pipe" on `ctr mission

* 🌱 Add containerd: "failed to copy: io: read/write on closed pipe" on `ctr mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "containerd-7972-failed-to-copy-io-read-write-on-closed-pipe-on-ctr-images-push-w",
+  "missionClass": "fixer",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "containerd: \"failed to copy: io: read/write on closed pipe\" on `ctr images push` while pushing large images",
+    "description": "\"failed to copy: io: read/write on closed pipe\" on `ctr images push` while pushing large images. This issue affects 25+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify containerd troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your containerd deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd -n containerd --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review containerd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant containerd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd\nkubectl get configmap -n containerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=containerd\n```\nWhile pushing large container image to a registry using \n```\nctr images push ghcr.io/akhilerm/private-testing:ci container-registry.oracle.com/database/express:21.3.0-xe\n```\nhitting the following error\n```\nfailed to copy: io: read/write on closed"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for \"failed to copy: io: read/write on closed pipe\" on `ctr…",
+        "description": "The fix is now picked into BuildKit v0.11.2 / Buildx v0.10.1 🎉 \nhttps://github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.11.2\nhttps://github.com/docker/buildx/releases/tag/v0.10.1\n```yaml\nctr images push ghcr.io/akhilerm/private-testing:ci container-registry.oracle.com/database/express:21.3.0-xe\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm \"failed to copy: io: read/write on closed pipe\"… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=containerd -n containerd --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n containerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The fix is now picked into BuildKit v0.11.2 / Buildx v0.10.1 🎉 \nhttps://github.com/moby/buildkit/releases/tag/v0.11.2\nhttps://github.com/docker/buildx/releases/tag/v0.10.1",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "ctr images push ghcr.io/akhilerm/private-testing:ci container-registry.oracle.com/database/express:21.3.0-xe",
+        "failed to copy: io: read/write on closed pipe",
+        "$ ctr images ls\nREF                                                      TYPE                                                      DIGEST                                                                  SIZE      PLATFORMS                                                                       LABELS\ncontainer-registry.oracle.com/database/express:21.3.0-xe application/vnd.docker.distribution.manifest.v2+json      sha256:016d1a2becd9c9b9bfb683eebf3aa092527fe1354ace5b23691e75759f301bed 3.3 GiB   linux/amd64                                                                     -"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "containerd",
+      "graduated",
+      "runtime",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "containerd"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/containerd/containerd/issues/7972",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/containerd/containerd"
+    },
+    "reactions": 25,
+    "comments": 20,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with containerd installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-04-02T06:30:35.525Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
